steps.title: Identify the primary target
steps.content: The student wants to introduce the artist's 1983 poetry collection — this collection must be the main focus of the sentence, not background information.

steps.title: Find the choice that makes this collection the focus
steps.content:
C opens with Precario/Precarious as the main subject, providing the publication year, publisher, and identifying Vicuña as multidisciplinary.

  • A treats the poetry collections as secondary to visual art
  • B discusses the artist generally without focusing on the 1983 collection
  • D focuses on visual art instead
.

Making the collection the main subject with specific publication information directly accomplishes the introduction goal.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
